reviews.review_title: Some high quality content to be found
reviews.review_description:
Desirium lures you in with a free experience on the moon with a mystery to uncover which is really well done and keeps you engaged. However, most experiences are not worth your time nor money, especially the beginner ones imo. The three "master" experiences are well designed and a good value, anything else is just not that good or way too short.
Still, it is free in general and if you contemplate what you might want to spend money for, I can only recommend this app.
A bunch of cool experiences. Must purchase tokens to purchase them from within the app but it's worth it
Bad
It only has the option for master when I just downloaded the app. The experience is awesome but I want to start as a beginner

developer_response.body:
Hello,
You can only choose "master" because the first time you start the app tutorial turns on and leads you through the main features of the app
If you don't want to play Moon you can press the "back" button, end tutorial and start as a "beginner"

reviews.review_description:
How can I drive myself?
I'm just sitting in the passenger seat and watching.
The ONLY free driving game :)

Part 2:  I have uninstalled and re-installed this app and now my 'GO' controller is working, but the app will not let me go to the 'Beginner' option or the 'Experienced' option.  I can click on the 'Master' option and get into that area, but I have not learned how to operate within the app.  So the 'Master' option is too difficult since I have no experience.  Can anyone help me with this problem?
Part 1:  My Oculus Go headset will not work.  I have tried every button on my controller, but it does not work for.  Help!  Or should I just uninstall it and forget the money I paid for it.

Really wish I could play this but it absolutely destroys my GO. No matter what experience I choose, the cannonball or astronaut everything freezes with a black screen and the entire GO seizes. Need to force shut down the GO which I’m sure can’t be doing any good for it. Uninstalling immediately
Is there a way to download the experiences without being in the app? The downloads take too long and they crash. Would be nice to take the headset off while downloads continue

This is like a hub for all kinds of games. You can play 'Moon: The Dark Side' for free, and i was impressed! This FREE game was the BEST Oculus Go game i have ever played. So i bought 600 coins ($2) and with some planning was able to get ALL the games for FREE. And i absolutely L-O-V-E the games.
Here are 3 reviews of the 3 'Master' games. 

Moon: The Dark Side:
Very refreshing, and perfectly done. From the walking/driving around to the story to the needing new oxygen around the 5 minutes. I never expected to find this gem on here. And it feels like the game was made with all the limitations in mind. For FREE. 9/10

Survivor:
The first game i bought with coins, and this game... It again feels like it was made for the Oculus Rift. And as such, i can tell you this is THE BEST game on the Oculus Go. You get a machete and a gun, wich you can switch between with your hand. This is usually a mechanic for games on the 400+ headsets, simply outstanding. And it feels fantastic just to chop the zombies heads off with the machete. Again, you can freely roam around the level. There aren't much other games on the Oculus Go where you can do that (like 2/3). Yes, it is a bit on the short side. But the game costs only 60 cents. 10/10

Mirkwood:
This game is a horror game, and AGAIN feels like it was made for the Oculus Rift. Absolutely love it. You can again freely roam around and is scary as sh*t. Feels like Resident Evil 7 but without guns. Fantastic. 9/10

reviews.review_title: Made me feel sick to my stomach at 3 min
reviews.review_description: In my opinion it's bad

I hate games that do this. The reviews made it look good but it just doesn't load. I bet it is probably good. But it didn't load for me so I didn't get a chance to feel that good. So annoying. I waited there for a long time until my go ran out of battery.

The experiences are really good! They are really immersive! I like the fact that your earn money as well when you level up so you don't really need to always use real money, though some graphics aren't great.
I rode the crazy swing and Mad Race and didn't get credit for it. If this is fixed I'd be glad to give 5 stars.

I love the game so much but the reason I’m giving it four stars is because I was doing the launch desirium seven days in a row and I got on today a bunch of times so i can complete the achievement and it wouldn’t work it wouldn’t let me get the achievement even tho I launched it I hope that will get fixed soon and when it does I’ll be glad to give it five stars
